description: Wealth Reader provides a banking aggregation and financial data service that connects to banks and other wealth sources so companies can retrieve balances, transactions, portfolios, loans, cards, and related financial information. Its product is aimed at fintech, banking, treasury, and wealth-management use cases.
summary: Wealth Reader exposes one documented REST API at `https://api.wealthreader.com/`, described by a public OpenAPI document, authenticated with a provisioned `api_key` sent as a form/body parameter.
